positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric arrangement of stylized mountains and abstract flora, designed as a repeating pattern. The color palette features deep midnight blue, burnt orange, sage green, and creamy off-white. The composition must utilize strong, clean silhouettes and flat graphic elements (vector art style). Use negative space effectively to create a balanced, iconic, and modern tribal aesthetic suitable for screen printing on apparel. The style should be high-contrast, graphic design illustration, with a focus on symmetry and clean lines. Central placement and radial composition.
